briefdescription.para: Get the decoder name for the current driver.

detaileddescription.para: This function depends on DT_DRV_COMPAT being defined.

briefdescription.para: Statically get the decoder for a given node.

detaileddescription.para: This macro should be created once per compatible string of a sensor and will create a statically referenceable decoder API.

briefdescription.para: Main header file for sensor driver API.
